zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy IX de Laval de Montmorency於大約1269年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延賴伐爾時，他的父親Guy VIII de Laval-Montmorency25歲，母親Isabelle de Beaumont-Gâtinais30歲。他於1297年與Beatrice de Gavre結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1333年1月22日在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷享年65歲，埋葬在法國麥延奧利維特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy IX de Laval de Montmorency于大约1269年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延賴伐爾时，他的父亲Guy VIII de Laval-Montmorency25岁，母亲Isabelle de Beaumont-Gâtinais30岁。他于1297年与Beatrice de Gavre结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1333年1月22日在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷享年65岁，埋葬在法国麥延奧利維特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Laval
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, Old French val (originally feminine, later masculine; see Val , compare Lavallee ), or a habitational name from Laval, the name of several places in various parts of France, ultimately derived from Latin vallis ‘valley’.

variants.name: Val
meanings: Spanish: variant of Valle , from val, a variant of valle ‘valley’. Compare Delval .
Galician and Portuguese: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, val (compare 3 below). Compare also Doval .

French and Haitian: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, (Old) French val (originally feminine, later masculine; compare Vallee ), from Latin vallis (feminine). Compare Duval and Laval .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

nameMeanings.name: IX
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: probably a contracted form of  Jep , vernacular form of   Jacob   .

en.lifeSummary: When Guy IX de Laval de Montmorency was born about 1269, in Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Guy VIII de Laval-Montmorency, was 25 and his mother, Isabelle de Beaumont-Gâtinais, was 30. He married Beatrice de Gavre in 1297. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 22 January 1333, in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, at the age of 65, and was buried in Olivet, Mayenne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy IX de Laval de Montmorency est né environ 1269, à Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Guy VIII de Laval-Montmorency, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Beaumont-Gâtinais, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Beatrice de Gavre en 1297. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 22 janvier 1333, à Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Olivet, Mayenne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guy IX de Laval de Montmorency um 1269 in Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy VIII de Laval-Montmorency 25 und seine Mutter Isabelle de Beaumont-Gâtinais 30. Er hat 1297 Beatrice de Gavre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Januar 1333 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich und wurde in Olivet, Mayenne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy IX de Laval de Montmorency è nato il circa 1269 nel Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, il suo padre, Guy VIII de Laval-Montmorency, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle de Beaumont-Gâtinais, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Beatrice de Gavre nel 1297. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 22 gennaio 1333, nel Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Olivet, Mayenne, Francia.

ko.lifeSummary: Guy IX de Laval de Montmorency(이)가 대략 1269년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 라발에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy VIII de Laval-Montmorency(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle de Beaumont-Gâtinais(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1297년 Beatrice de Gavre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1333년 1월 22일 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 비트e에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 메이니 라이베트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy IX de Laval de Montmorency nasceu aproximadamente 1269, em Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Guy VIII de Laval-Montmorency, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Beaumont-Gâtinais, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrice de Gavre em 1297. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de janeiro de 1333, em Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Olivet, Mayenne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy IX de Laval de Montmorency родился около 1269 г. в местности лаваль, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Guy VIII de Laval-Montmorency было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Beaumont-Gâtinais, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice de Gavre в 1297 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 22 января 1333 г. в местности витрe, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности оливет, меиенн, Франция.

Se casó con Beatrice de Gavre en 1297. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 22 de enero de 1333, en Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Olivet, Mayenne, Francia.
